meta.purpose: surface form vs a REAL competing form (plural vs singular, are vs is): does the lens commit to the right number, and in which band? wrong form is never a non-word
meta.note: casing dropped -- the authored casing prompts had 0 clean items (the model never produced the Title-case form)
